Definition: Shortcuts/incomplete work that needs fixing later

Examples:
- Quick fixes needing proper solutions
- Missing documentation
- Inadequate testing
- Code needing refactoring

Manage by: Track, allocate time, prevent new debt

1. All tests traceable to requirements
2. Plan tests before coding
3. 80-20 rule: 20% code has 80% defects
4. Start small, progress to large
5. Exhaustive testing impossible
6. Independent testing effective
